title: anthyllis vulneraria var. maura
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. maura, also known as Black kidney vetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as wound healing, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. Black kidney vetch can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and immune function.
